trigger: when making changes to sync or apply commands
action: ensure flags and behavior are consistent between sync and apply; check both --detailed-exitcode, --timeout, and any user-facing flag

trigger: when modifying code that processes helmfiles sequentially
action: use absolute baseDir instead of os.Chdir to prevent race conditions and path resolution bugs

trigger: when adding a commit to a helmfile PR branch
action: format as 'type: description (#PR)' with types feat/fix/chore/docs/test/refactor and reference the PR number

trigger: when writing diff-related code in helmfile
action: verify that flagsForDiff includes --kube-context from appendConnectionFlags, --namespace from namespace flags, and --reset-values from appendValuesControlModeFlag

trigger: when adding a feature that differs between Helm 3 and Helm 4
action: use h.isHelm4() guard with Helm 4 as the primary path and Helm 3 as the fallback; check flag names differ between versions

trigger: when handling values arrays in helmfile state
action: default to replacing arrays (not merging element-by-element) unless there is an explicit semantic reason to merge

trigger: when adding a feature flag to a helmfile provider interface
action: prefer type assertion at the call site (e.g., c.(interface{ DetailedExitcode() bool })) over adding methods to ConfigProvider

trigger: when writing a Go test in helmfile
action: use table-driven tests with testify/assert, use -count=1 flag, and use t.Run subtests for each case

trigger: when adding error handling to helmfile
action: use fmt.Errorf with %w for error wrapping, match existing style (lowercase, no trailing punctuation), and avoid hardcoded strings that differ from similar features

trigger: when reviewing a PR for concurrent file operations
action: check for shared cache access, os.Chdir usage, and unprotected shared state — these are recurring sources of race conditions
